creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
ports-cutegory: japanese

here is a patch for japanese/tcl80.
it update tcl8.0.3jp1.1 to tcl8.0.4jp1.3.
some bugs will be fixed.

Fix: please apply following patch.
and remove japanese/tcl80/patches/patch-ab. this file is
included in original tcl distrib now.

BEGIN>---8<cut here>8---


END>---8<cut here>8-----djts7naAykwMdBfsHknOvI3zGGekvPDxBH5EY1Xmm6gQ43ct
